dashboard_page.title: Dashboard
dashboard_page.welcome_back: Welcome back! Here's a summary of your activity.
dashboard_page.create_quote_desc: Start a new quote for a client.

dashboard_analytics.title: Quote Analytics
dashboard_analytics.description: Visualize your quote activity over time.
dashboard_analytics.revenue_description: Track your revenue from paid quotes.

quotes_page.title: Quotes
quotes_page.card_description: Filter, search, and manage all your created quotes.
quotes_page.no_quotes: No quotes found. Create one to get started.
quotes_page.delete_dialog_description: This will permanently delete the quote "{quoteNumber}". This action cannot be undone.
quotes_page.toast_coming_soon_description: Duplicating quotes will be available soon.
quotes_page.anonymous_limit_reached: Guests can create {count} quotes. Sign up for more.
quotes_page.registered_limit_reached: You've reached your limit of {count} quotes.

new_quote_page.title: New Quote
new_quote_page.card_description: Fill in the details to create a new quote.
new_quote_page.anonymous_limit_reached: To create more than {count} quotes, please create an account. It's free and allows you to save your work.
new_quote_page.registered_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum of {count} quotes. To create more, please upgrade your plan (coming soon) or delete some old quotes.

edit_quote_page.title: Edit Quote
edit_quote_page.card_description: Update the details of your quote.

quote_form.title: Quote Title
quote_form.new_client_dialog_description: Add a new client to your records. After saving, you can select them from the dropdown.
quote_form.no_clients: No clients found. Click 'New Client' above.
quote_form.description_placeholder: Detailed description of the service or product...
quote_form.add_from_block_dialog_description: Select a block to add it as a new item to your quote.
quote_form.default_section_description: List of products and services included in the quote.

clients_page.title: Clients
clients_page.no_clients: No clients found. Create one to get started.
clients_page.delete_dialog_description: This will permanently delete the client "{clientName}". This action cannot be undone.

new_client_page.title: New Client
new_client_page.card_description: Fill in the details to add a new client to your records.

edit_client_page.title: Edit Client
edit_client_page.card_description: Update the details for this client.

client_view_page.quotes_description: A list of all quotes for {clientName}.
client_view_page.no_quotes: No quotes found for this client.

reusable_blocks_page.title: Reusable Blocks
reusable_blocks_page.card_description: Manage your reusable services and products.
reusable_blocks_page.no_blocks: No blocks created yet. Start by creating one.
reusable_blocks_page.delete_dialog_description: This action will permanently delete the block "{blockName}". It cannot be undone.
reusable_blocks_page.anonymous_limit_reached: Guests can create {count} blocks. Sign up for more.
reusable_blocks_page.registered_limit_reached: You've reached your limit of {count} blocks.

new_reusable_block_page.title: New Reusable Block
new_reusable_block_page.card_description: Fill in the details to add a new reusable block.
new_reusable_block_page.anonymous_limit_reached: To create more than {count} blocks, please create an account.
new_reusable_block_page.registered_limit_reached: You have reached the maximum of {count} blocks. To create more, please upgrade your plan (coming soon) or delete some old blocks.

edit_reusable_block_page.title: Edit Block
edit_reusable_block_page.card_description: Update the details of this reusable block.

reusable_block_form.description_placeholder: Detailed description of the service or product...

templates_page.title: PDF Design & Templates
templates_page.card_description: A powerful template management system is on its way.
templates_page.content: This section is under construction. Soon you'll be able to create and manage quote templates to speed up your workflow!
templates_page.layout_description: Choose the general structure for your quotes.
templates_page.branding_description: Customize colors to match your brand identity.

settings_page.title: Settings
settings_page.card_description: Update your company information and default settings.
settings_page.localisation_description: Set your language and currency preferences.
settings_page.currency_description: Choose your default currency for quotes.
settings_page.calculation_description: Configure how prices and taxes are calculated.
settings_page.integrations_description: Manage API keys for third-party services.
settings_page.email_template_description: Customize the default email sent with quotes.
settings_page.login_to_configure_email: Log in to configure email templates.

settings_form.logo_url_description: Link to your company logo. This will appear on your quotes.
settings_form.default_terms_description: These terms will be automatically added to new quotes.
settings_form.gemini_api_key_placeholder: Enter your Google Gemini API key
settings_form.gemini_api_key_description: Your key is stored securely and used for AI features like description generation.
settings_form.prices_include_tax_description: Choose whether the prices you enter for items already include tax.
settings_form.tax_exclusive: Prices exclude tax (tax is added on top)
settings_form.tax_inclusive: Prices include tax (tax is calculated from the total)

login_page.description: Enter your email below to login to your account

register_page.title: Create an account
register_page.description: Enter your information to create an account

errors.enter_email_password: Please enter both email and password.
errors.login_required: You must be logged in to perform this action.
errors.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

toasts.quote_delete_failed_description: An error occurred while deleting the quote.
toasts.quote_save_failed_description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
toasts.download_failed_description: An error occurred while generating the PDF.
toasts.block_added_description: The block has been added to your quote items.
toasts.block_updated_description: The block "{blockName}" has been updated successfully.
toasts.block_created_description: The block "{blockName}" has been created successfully.
toasts.settings_saved_description: Your profile has been updated successfully.
toasts.limits_saved_description: Quote creation limits have been updated.
toasts.gemini_key_missing_description: Please add your Google Gemini API key in the Settings page to use this feature.
toasts.ai_generating_description: The AI is at work. Please wait a moment.
toasts.ai_success_description: The new description has been added to the item.
toasts.ai_error_description: Could not generate description. Please check your API key and try again.
toasts.template_settings_saved_description: Your PDF design preferences have been updated.

auth_modal.title: Access Full Features
auth_modal.description: Create an account or log in to save your work and access all features.

admin_page.title: Admin Panel
admin_page.card_description: View and manage all registered users.
admin_page.access_denied: You do not have permission to view this page.
admin_page.app_limits_description: Set the maximum number of items users can create.

hero.title: Create Professional Quotes in Seconds
hero.description: QuoterWise leverages AI to help you generate beautiful, accurate quotes effortlessly. Manage clients, reuse items, and get paid faster.

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.description: Our platform is packed with features designed to streamline your quoting process and impress your clients.

item1.title: AI-Powered Descriptions
item1.description: Generate compelling item descriptions with a single click, saving you time and effort.

item2.title: Client Management
item2.description: Keep all your client information organized and accessible in one place.

item3.title: Reusable Blocks
item3.description: Save common items and services as "blocks" to add them to future quotes instantly.

item4.title: Professional Templates
item4.description: Create beautiful, branded quotes that impress your clients every time.

item5.title: Stripe Integration
item5.description: Manage PRO subscriptions seamlessly and securely with Stripe.

item6.title: Insightful Dashboard
item6.description: Get a clear overview of your business with stats on quotes, clients, and revenue.

cta.title: Ready to streamline your quoting process?
cta.description: Stop wasting time on manual quotes. Start winning more business today.

quote_preview.item1_description: This service covers the design and development of a professional, modern website, optimized for an excellent user experience and mobile compatibility.
quote_preview.item2_description: This service involves developing a custom plugin, specifically designed to meet your business's unique needs. We focus on creating seamlessly integrated solutions.

validation.items_min: At least one item is required.
